problem_statement: Inefficient manual booking processes in beauty salons often lead to customer inconvenience, scheduling conflicts, and missed appointments. Customers lack the flexibility to book services and preferred technicians in advance, and salons struggle with managing schedules and communicating effectively with clients regarding their appointments.
solution_overview: Develop an online booking system for a beauty salon that allows customers to book appointments in advance, select specific services and their preferred technicians. The system will also include an automated notification feature to send reminders and confirmations via LINE or SMS, enhancing customer experience and operational efficiency for the salon.
functional_requirements: Customers can view available time slots and book appointments in advance.
Customers can select one or more specific services for their booking.
Customers can choose their preferred technician or stylist for the service.
Automated notifications for booking confirmation, reminders, and updates delivered via LINE or SMS.
Salon staff can manage and view all incoming appointments and schedules.
Salon staff can manage services offered, technician availability, and pricing.
Customers can view their booking history and upcoming appointments.
Ability for customers or staff to cancel or reschedule appointments.
non_functional_requirements: The system must be highly available and reliable, minimizing downtime.
The user interface for both customers and salon staff must be intuitive and easy to use (Usability).
Customer data and booking information must be secured and protected against unauthorized access (Security).
The system should be responsive and handle concurrent bookings efficiently (Performance).
The architecture should be scalable to accommodate growth in customer base and services (Scalability).
The system should be easy to maintain and update with new features (Maintainability).
tech_stack_recommendation: Frontend: React, Angular, or Vue.js for a responsive web application, or React Native/Flutter for a mobile application.
Backend: Node.js (Express), Python (Django/Flask), or PHP (Laravel) for API development and business logic.
Database: PostgreSQL or MySQL for relational data storage (bookings, users, services, technicians).
Notification Services: Integration with LINE Messaging API and a commercial SMS Gateway provider (e.g., Twilio).
Cloud Platform: AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), or Azure for hosting and scalable infrastructure.
